info.title: Masumi SaaS API
info.description: HTTP API for Masumi SaaS (same origin as the web app). Authenticate with a session cookie or the x-api-key header (see API Keys in the app).

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Public registration and authentication bootstrap flows

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Masumi SaaS API key from **API Keys** in the app. Send only this header (no Bearer scheme in this spec).

id.description: Unique identifier for the API key

permission.description: Permission level of the API key

usageLimited.description: Whether the API key has usage limits

NetworkLimit.description: List of Cardano networks this API key is allowed to access

unit.description: Asset policy id + asset name concatenated. Use an empty string for ADA/lovelace e.g (1000000 lovelace = 1 ADA)

amount.description: The quantity of the asset. Make sure to convert it from the underlying smallest unit (in case of decimals, multiply it by the decimal factor e.g. for 1 ADA = 10000000 lovelace)

RemainingUsageCredits.description: Remaining usage credits for this API key

status.description: Current status of the API key

walletScopeEnabled.description: Whether wallet scope filtering is enabled for this API key

hotWalletId.description: ID of the hot wallet in scope

WalletScopes.description: List of hot wallets this API key is scoped to

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the secret was last updated

mnemonic.description: Decrypted 24-word mnemonic phrase for the wallet

post.summary: Register with email
post.description: Creates a new account if needed, then sends a magic sign-in link to the provided email address. The client must confirm terms acceptance before calling this route.

callbackUrl.description: Optional same-origin path to open after the magic link is used.

400.description: Invalid request body

429.description: Too many registration requests from this client

500.description: Registration email could not be queued or sent

get.summary: Health check
get.description: Confirms this app and the Masumi payment service behind it are up. **503** means the payment service is unreachable or not reporting healthy.

200.description: App and payment service are healthy

429.description: Too many health checks from this client in the window

503.description: Payment service unreachable or unhealthy from this environment

example.error: Payment node health check timed out

get.summary: API key status
get.description: Returns whether the caller is authenticated with a **browser session** or a **Masumi SaaS API key** (`x-api-key` / `Authorization: Bearer`). For API key auth, includes public metadata for that key (id, name, prefix, start fragment). Does **not** echo the secret key.

200.description: `authMethod` is `session` for cookie auth, or `apiKey` when the request was authenticated with an API key.

400.description: Validation or bad request

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

get.summary: List agents
get.description: Paginated list of the authenticated user’s agents. Effective **network** filter uses the `network` query param, or the `payment_network` cookie when the query is omitted.

400.description: Validation or bad request

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

post.summary: Start agent registration
post.description: Creates a new agent and begins registration in Masumi SaaS. Returns **400** if `tags` is missing or empty after splitting on commas (at least one tag required).

schema.description: At least one tag is required: send `tags` as a comma-separated string (e.g. `"research, nlp"`).

400.description: Validation or bad request

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

post.description:
Proxied via Masumi SaaS to the Masumi registry service. Authenticate here with a browser session or Masumi SaaS API key; SaaS forwards the upstream token server-side.

Query registry entries whose status was updated after the provided timestamp. Supports pagination. Always use statusUpdatedAt of the last item + its cursorId to paginate forward. This guarantees to include all items at least once, when paginating. Note: if the cursorId is not valid it will include all items with an id greater than the cursorId (in string comparison order). If no cursorId is provided, all items, including those with the same statusUpdatedAt, will be included. In case the statusUpdatedAt is before the provided statusUpdatedAfter, all items after the statusUpdatedAfter will be included, regardless of the cursorId.
post.summary: REQUIRES API KEY Authentication (+user)

cursorId.description: The ID of the last item in the previous page, it and all items after it will be included in the next page response if they did not change since the last page (if they did they will be moved to the newer timestamp). Guaranteed to include all items at least once, when paginating forward. (always use statusUpdatedAt of the last item + its cursorId to paginate forward)

policyId.description: The policy ID of the registry source to filter by. If not specified, queries all registry sources.
